testimonial.quote: The best charity golf event in Atlanta — incredible cause, incredible people. We'll be back every year.
testimonial.name: 2025 Gold Sponsor

faqs.question: What's included with my sponsorship or foursome?
faqs.answer: All packages include lunch, beverages, golf cart, and a swag bag. Sponsorship tiers also include signage, social media promotion, and additional perks depending on level.

faqs.question: Can I register a single golfer instead of a foursome?
faqs.answer: The tournament is organized by foursomes. If you'd like to play individually, contact us and we'll pair you with a group.

faqs.question: Where does the money go?
faqs.answer: 100% of proceeds fund dream room makeovers for children with special needs through Sunshine on a Ranney Day. Zeffy charges zero platform fees.

faqs.question: Can I donate without playing?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! You can donate directly or shop Sunny & Ranney — profits go directly to funding room makeovers.

faqs.question: What is the format of the tournament?
faqs.answer: The tournament is a scramble format — perfect for players of all skill levels. It's about having fun and supporting a great cause.

faqs.question: Is there a dress code?
faqs.answer: Standard golf attire is required. Collared shirts, golf shorts or pants, and soft-spike golf shoes.

main.name: Presenting Sponsor
main.perk: Oakley sunglasses + Footjoy shoes per player, video interview, logo on all signage & social media

main.name: Titanium Sponsor
main.perk: Oakley sunglasses or Footjoy shoes, video interview, logo placement

main.name: Diamond Sponsor
main.perk: Video interview, logo on social media & signage
